ValidationRule.description: Please choose the lease when On Lease
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(!leaseworks__Historical_Lease__c, OR(TEXT( leaseworks__Status__c )='On Lease', TEXT( leaseworks__Status__c )='Lease Extension', TEXT( leaseworks__Status__c )='Lease Termination'), ISBLANK(leaseworks__Lease__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose the lease if this is not a historical lease or check the Historical Lease checkbox.
